textByHash.c4b59b9b3690f7203dc2190667b19de00b8ea167: It really is incredibly dangerous down there!
textByHash.6bb82cba97944d28c5dfc76f82cd528fb8866c6d: You should take some food down with you in case you get hurt!
textByHash.c39a7cdc5ecaf121048f2308cdde66598d3d6d7b: I wouldn't take many valuables down there, just in case something bad happens.
textByHash.da1fa08f742ecdb0e2716886c5095470bedb620b: If you see a scarab on any of the walls, stay well away from it!
textByHash.6d77cec7099d07b5604256514c21b91043e3d53d: I saw one of the other guards disappear down a trapdoor when he approached it. We never saw him again!
textByHash.c9a7463b990c91e129b97b1e00eda7cc3069acab: No. I'm a security guard, not a bank clerk.
textByHash.14378760622778bcd0ad09f0990eb69992f025b3: Someone smashed the wall when they were robbing the bank.
textByHash.a6d367fa503bd79e8c668500e4cd4f551535ece6: Yes, but we were able to get more staff and mend the wall easily enough.
textByHash.56ddae0cf19695cb449a87ec7cb32ac5fa943e20: The Bank has already replaced all the stolen items that belonged to customers.
textByHash.21661de28a1fd3f8e23584d8297d24a24a0c3ce6: Yes, but the new ones are just as good.
textByHash.005a8295b9856e9121e6e2952388c727239be540: No-one's expecting me to be nice.
textByHash.22a3ac2560bbe2219f6c3d0aab086dde80c48a67: We are fairly sure we know who the robber was. The security recording was damaged in the attack, but it still shows his face clearly enough.
textByHash.fe49da035f40d24527ab1ac7b7c0b3282184ac75: Yes. Our insurers insisted that we install a magical scrying orb.
textByHash.cc93607d840d22e3a819aa435aa9de6f15faf00e: I suppose so. But it's quite long.
textByHash.9d9b743cb9652f646a16656318dd38e02ca9c98e: Alright... The bank's magical playback device will feed the recorded images into your mind. Just shut your eyes.
textByHash.d1106e28abf78fd58091463bb01c5d9fcf5027b0: Thanks, but we already know where to find our suspect.
textByHash.d49ed8e67349a6a340e3837ffd1db84e91b8e1e2: The amount of evidence against him makes that almost unnecessary.
textByHash.b2026f7bfef6fd58d00b633136b5bb3a509ebc9a: We're certainly keeping an eye on him. I'm afraid I can't give you any more details about the case.
textByHash.ea5af12f74c871e778b5e8df8bb69ad2f603a7c3: I'd like you to pay me 50 gp first.
textByHash.9a5971b44c2c90eb83bd31f233e54f149108692a: As a bank employee, I suppose I could take the money directly from your bank account.
